summary: Tested Growth & Marketing features: Public Trending Products page, Public Product page with social sharing, Referral System APIs, Landing Page with Trending nav, and Signup with referral badge. Backend: 15/15 API tests passed. Frontend: All public pages working. Fixed PublicProductPage Helmet error (product_name undefined causing react-helmet-async to crash).
passed_tests: GET /api/public/trending-products returns 200 with products array, count, last_updated
Products have launch_score, product_name, id fields
GET /api/viral/public/product/{id} returns partial data with is_partial=true
Public product has margin_range (not exact margin)
POST /api/viral/referral/track returns 404 for invalid referral code
GET /api/viral/referral/stats returns stats with demo token
GET /api/viral/referral/history returns referrals with demo token
/trending-products page renders with 10 product cards, share buttons, SEO meta tags
/p/{id} public product page renders with TrendScout branding and Share menu (Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp, Copy Link)
/ landing page renders with hero, features, pricing, 'Trending' nav link
/signup?ref=TESTCODE shows referral badge 'You were referred by a friend!'
DashboardLayout sidebar has 'Referrals' link in navigation array
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PublicProductPage.jsx had react-helmet-async error when product.product_name was undefined - added fallback 'productName = product.product_name || "Trending Product"'
All public API endpoints properly configured and returning expected data
Share menu correctly implements Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp, and Copy Link options
Referral badge correctly shown on signup page when ref query param present

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all public pages working, dashboard pages require Supabase auth)

test_credentials: Demo token format: demo_{user_id} (used for backend API testing)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing products from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth & Marketing features fully tested. Public pages (/trending-products, /p/{id}, /, /signup?ref=X) all working. Backend referral APIs work with demo tokens. Dashboard pages require Supabase auth for full UI testing. PublicProductPage fix ensures Helmet doesn't crash on undefined product_name.

features: Share menu (Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp, Copy Link)

dashboard_referrals_link.note: DashboardLayout.jsx has 'Referrals' in navigation array at line 32
